testFiles.description: Unit tests for the edge subdivision utility that tessellates LineSegments edges into sub-segments with parametric attributes for arc displacement
Integration tests for electric arc shader: wireframe polyhedra and constellation lines with arc enabled, attribute presence, uniform updates, and quality-gated behavior

subdivideEdges.ts: aEdgeParam tapering (0 at endpoints, peak at midpoint)
quality.ts: medium tier enables arc with 5 subdivisions
high tier enables arc with 8 subdivisions
